anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1170: Luffy's Gear Sixth Revealed?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spoilers for One Piece Chapter 1170 hint at Luffy unlocking a new Gear Sixth form during the final battle against Imu. Fans are speculating on the power scaling implications, with theories flooding Reddit. The chapter is set for official release on May 3, 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: 20th Anniversary Blu-ray Box Set Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: To celebrate the 20th anniversary of Death Note's anime debut, a limited edition Blu-ray box set has been announced, featuring remastered video and a new soundtrack. Pre-orders open on May 5, 2026, priced at $199.99.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto TBV Chapter 15 - Boruto's New Jutsu
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Chapter 15 reveals Boruto's new space-time ninjutsu, shocking fans. The chapter sold over 500,000 copies in Japan in its first week. Discussion on power creep and comparisons to Naruto are trending.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball DAIMA Episode 18: Goku's Demon Realm Transformation
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest episode of Dragon Ball DAIMA showcases Goku's new Demon Realm transformation, sparking debates on its power level compared to Ultra Instinct. The episode achieved a 6.5 rating on MyAnimeList.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Trailer: Culling Games Arc Heats Up
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll releases the official trailer for Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3, covering the Culling Games arc. The trailer reveals new character designs and a release date of July 2026. Fan reactions are overwhelmingly positive, with over 10 million views in 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie 2 - Release Date Confirmed
anime_pulse_items.summary: The second film in the Infinity Castle trilogy is set for a November 2026 release in Japan. New poster art features Tanjiro and Muzan. The first film grossed over $500 million worldwide, setting high expectations.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters - Director's Cut Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: A director's cut of Attack on Titan's final episodes will stream on Crunchyroll in June 2026, featuring extended scenes and a new post-credits sequence. Fans debate whether this changes the controversial ending.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Manga Ending: Chapter 430 Predictions
anime_pulse_items.summary: With My Hero Academia manga approaching its end in Chapter 430, fans theorize about Deku's fate and potential epilogue. The series has sold over 100 million copies worldwide. Reddit is buzzing with theories.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: New Trailer and Release Window
anime_pulse_items.summary: Chainsaw Man Season 2 trailer released on Netflix, revealing the 'International Assassins' arc. Premieres in August 2026. Fans are hyped for the introduction of new characters like Quanxi and the Gun Devil.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: First Key Visual and Plot Details
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family Season 3 key visual shows the Forger family in a new mission. The season will adapt the 'Red Circus' arc, with a July 2026 premiere on Crunchyroll. Merchandise sales are booming.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at 2026 Crunchyroll Awards
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren took home Anime of the Year at the 2026 Crunchyroll Anime Awards, with Season 2 announced for early 2027. The series' emotional depth and animation quality are praised.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Episode 20 - Jin-Woo vs. Monarchs
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 episode 20 features an epic battle between Jin-Woo and the Monarchs, with stunning animation by A-1 Pictures. The manhwa comparison sparks debates on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action One Piece Season 2 Cast
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals the cast for One Piece live-action Season 2, including new actors for Chopper and Robin. Filming begins this month. The first season was a massive hit, with over 100 million viewers.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds Classic Anime: 'Cowboy Bebop' Remastered
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll adds a remastered version of Cowboy Bebop with improved audio and video. The series celebrates its 28th anniversary. Fans are rewatching and discussing its lasting influence.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Manga One-Shot by Obata and Ohba?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Rumors swirl of a new Death Note one-shot manga by the original creators, possibly featuring a new Kira. Fans are excited but skeptical. No official confirmation yet.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO Game Breaks Sales Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO sells over 5 million copies in its first month, becoming the fastest-selling Dragon Ball game. New DLC characters announced including Super Saiyan God Goku.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Manga: Chapter 270 Spoilers - Gojo's Return?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Leaked spoilers for Jujutsu Kaisen Chapter 270 hint at Gojo's possible return, causing massive debates. The series is in its final arc, with over 90 million copies in circulation.
